root_cause: curvine-fuse xattr and file-flag semantics diverge from Linux: removexattr succeeds when attribute is absent; user.* xattrs are not rejected on special nodes; socket mknod/bind is unsupported; FS_IOC_SETFLAGS is unimplemented so immutable setup fails.
planned_changes: Return ENODATA when removexattr targets a missing user attribute
Reject user.* xattr get/set on fifo/char/block/socket nodes with ENODATA
Add socket special-file mknod support and read-only metadata open handles
Implement FUSE_IOCTL FS_IOC_GETFLAGS/SETFLAGS via internal curvine.i_flags xattr
Block setxattr/removexattr on immutable/append-only files with EPERM
not_goals: Full AF_UNIX bind/connect semantics beyond socket node creation (issue #1257)
General ioctl passthrough beyond file flags
